option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# SmartRecharge Cloud Microservices System
Enterprise-grade telecom recharge platform built with Spring Boot microservices, Spring Cloud Config, Eureka, API Gateway, RabbitMQ, and PostgreSQL.
## Modules
- `config-server` (port 8060) - `eureka-server` (port 8061) - `api-gateway` (port 8062) - `customer-service` (port 8063) - `recharge-service` (port 8064) - `processing-service` (port 8065) - `config-repo` (centralized config files consumed by config server)
## Prerequisites (Local Development)
- Java 17+ - Maven 3.9+ - PostgreSQL running on `localhost:5432` - RabbitMQ running on `localhost:5672`
Create databases locally:
```sql CREATE DATABASE customer_db; CREATE DATABASE recharge_db; CREATE DATABASE processing_db; ```
Default credentials: - PostgreSQL: `postgres` / `root` - RabbitMQ: `guest` / `guest`
## Quick Start with Docker (Recommended)
### Build all services
```bash mvn clean package -DskipTests ```
### Start entire stack with Docker Compose
```bash docker-compose up --build ```
This will automatically: - Start PostgreSQL (creates 3 databases: `customer_db`, `recharge_db`, `processing_db`) - Start RabbitMQ (management UI at `http://localhost:15672`) - Start all 6 microservices - Perform health checks and proper startup sequencing
### Stop all services
```bash docker-compose down ```
### View logs
```bash docker-compose logs -f config-server docker-compose logs -f eureka-server docker-compose logs -f api-gateway docker-compose logs -f customer-service docker-compose logs -f recharge-service docker-compose logs -f processing-service ```
## Local Development (Without Docker)
### Start Order (in separate terminals)
1. Ensure PostgreSQL and RabbitMQ are running locally
2. Start config server: ```bash mvn -pl config-server spring-boot:run ```
3. Start eureka server: ```bash mvn -pl eureka-server spring-boot:run ```
4. Start API gateway: ```bash mvn -pl api-gateway spring-boot:run ```
5. Start customer service: ```bash mvn -pl customer-service spring-boot:run ```
6. Start recharge service: ```bash mvn -pl recharge-service spring-boot:run ```
7. Start processing service: ```bash mvn -pl processing-service spring-boot:run ```
## Access Services
### Swagger UI (OpenAPI Docs)
- Customer Service: `http://localhost:8063/swagger-ui.html` - Recharge Service: `http://localhost:8064/swagger-ui.html` - Processing Service: `http://localhost:8065/swagger-ui.html`
### Service Discovery
- Eureka Server: `http://localhost:8061`
### RabbitMQ Management
- RabbitMQ Admin: `http://localhost:15672` - Default credentials: `guest` / `guest`
## API Endpoints
### API Gateway Routes
All requests go through the API Gateway on `http://localhost:8062`
#### Customer Service - `POST /api/customers` - Create customer - `GET /api/customers` - Get all customers - `GET /api/customers/{id}` - Get customer by ID - `PUT /api/customers/{id}` - Update customer
#### Recharge Service - `POST /api/recharges` - Create recharge request - `GET /api/recharges` - Get all recharges - `GET /api/recharges/{id}` - Get recharge by ID - `GET /api/recharges/customer/{customerId}` - Get recharges by customer
#### Processing Service - `GET /api/transactions` - Get all transactions - `GET /api/transactions/{id}` - Get transaction by ID - `GET /api/transactions/recharge/{rechargeId}` - Get transactions by recharge ID
## Data Flow
``` Frontend / Client ↓ API Gateway (port 8062) ↓ ┌───────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ Customer Service │ Recharge Service │ │ (port 8063) │ (port 8064) │ │ ├→ RabbitMQ │ │ │ (recharge.exchange) │ └───────────────────┼───────────────────────┘ ↓ Processing Service (port 8065) ↓ PostgreSQL Database (customer_db, recharge_db, processing_db) ```
## Recharge Flow
1. **Request**: User sends recharge request to API Gateway → Recharge Service 2. **Validation**: Recharge Service validates customer via Customer Service (Feign client) 3. **Publishing**: Recharge Service publishes event to RabbitMQ exchange (`recharge.exchange`) 4. **Consumption**: Processing Service consumes event from queue (`recharge.queue`) 5. **Processing**: Processing Service processes recharge and saves transaction record 6. **Status Update**: Transaction stored in `processing_db` with status `PROCESSED`
## Database Schema
### Customer Service (`customer_db`) - Table: `customers` - `customer_id` (PK) - `customer_name` - `email` - `mobile_number` - `city` - `registration_date`
### Recharge Service (`recharge_db`) - Table: `recharges` - `recharge_id` (PK) - `customer_id` - `mobile_number` - `operator_name` - `amount` - `recharge_status` - `request_time`
### Processing Service (`processing_db`) - Table: `recharge_transactions` - `transaction_id` (PK) - `recharge_id` - `customer_id` - `mobile_number` - `operator_name` - `amount` - `processing_status` - `remarks` - `processed_time`
## Build
```bash mvn clean install ```
## Testing the System
### Example: Create Customer
```bash curl -X POST http://localhost:8062/api/customers \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d '{ "customerName": "John Doe", "email": "john@example.com", "mobileNumber": "9876543210", "city": "New York" }' ```
### Example: Create Recharge
```bash curl -X POST http://localhost:8062/api/recharges \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d '{ "customerId": 1, "mobileNumber": "9876543210", "operatorName": "Verizon", "amount": 49.99 }' ```
### Example: Get Transactions
```bash curl http://localhost:8062/api/transactions ```
## Technology Stack
- **Framework**: Spring Boot 3.3.5 - **Cloud**: Spring Cloud 2023.0.3 - **Service Discovery**: Netflix Eureka - **API Gateway**: Spring Cloud Gateway - **Config Server**: Spring Cloud Config Server - **Messaging**: RabbitMQ with AMQP - **Database**: PostgreSQL - **ORM**: Spring Data JPA / Hibernate - **API Docs**: Springdoc OpenAPI / Swagger - **Utilities**: Lombok, Feign (for inter-service calls) - **Build**: Maven - **Java Version**: Java 17 - **Containerization**: Docker & Docker Compose
## Troubleshooting
### PostgreSQL connection refused - Ensure PostgreSQL is running on port 5432 - Check credentials: `postgres` / `root` - For Docker: Check if postgres service started: `docker ps | grep postgres`
### RabbitMQ connection refused - Ensure RabbitMQ is running on port 5672 - For Docker: Check if rabbitmq service started: `docker ps | grep rabbitmq`
### Eureka shows no services registered - Wait 30 seconds for all services to register - Check individual service logs for startup errors - Verify network connectivity between services
### Services cannot communicate - For Docker: Services use container DNS (e.g., `http://customer-service:8063`) - For local dev: Ensure all services are running on configured ports - Check firewall settings
## Production Deployment
For production deployment: 1. Update `config-repo/*.yml` with production database credentials and endpoints 2. Build JAR artifacts: `mvn clean package` 3. Build Docker images: `docker build -t smartrecharge/<service>:1.0.0 ./<service>` 4. Push to container registry: `docker push smartrecharge/<service>:1.0.0` 5. Deploy to Kubernetes or Docker Swarm with updated image references 6. Ensure external PostgreSQL and RabbitMQ instances are configured 7. Set appropriate resource limits and replicas
## Support
For issues or questions, check individual service logs or refer to the Spring Cloud documentation.

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: FROM eclipse-temurin:17-jre WORKDIR /app COPY target/api-gateway-1.0.0.jar app.jar EXPOSE 8062 ENTRYPOINT ["java","-jar","/app/app.jar"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <module org.jetbrains.idea.maven.project.MavenProjectsManager.isMavenModule="true" type="JAVA_MODULE" version="4"> <component name="NewModuleRootManager" LANGUAGE_LEVEL="MODULE_17"> <output url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/target/classes" /> <output-test url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/target/test-classes" /> <content url="file://$MODULE_DIR$"> <sourceFolder url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/src/main/java" isTestSource="false" /> <sourceFolder url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/src/main/resources" type="java-resource" /> <sourceFolder url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/src/test/java" isTestSource="true" /> <excludeFolder url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/target" /> </content> <orderEntry type="inheritedJdk" /> <orderEntry type="sourceFolder" /> </component> </module>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<parent> <groupId>com.smartrecharge</groupId> <artifactId>smartrecharge-system</artifactId> <version>1.0.0</version> <relativePath>../pom.xml</relativePath> </parent>
<artifactId>api-gateway</artifactId> <name>api-gateway</name>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-gateway</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-netflix-eureka-client</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-config</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-actuator</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springdoc</groupId> <artifactId>springdoc-openapi-starter-webflux-ui</artifactId> <version>2.6.0</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <optional>true</optional> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <module org.jetbrains.idea.maven.project.MavenProjectsManager.isMavenModule="true" type="JAVA_MODULE" version="4"> <component name="NewModuleRootManager" LANGUAGE_LEVEL="MODULE_17"> <output url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/target/classes" /> <output-test url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/target/test-classes" /> <content url="file://$MODULE_DIR$"> <sourceFolder url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/src/main/java" isTestSource="false" /> <sourceFolder url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/src/main/resources" type="java-resource" /> <sourceFolder url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/src/test/java" isTestSource="true" /> <excludeFolder url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/target" /> </content> <orderEntry type="inheritedJdk" /> <orderEntry type="sourceFolder" /> </component> </module>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<parent> <groupId>com.smartrecharge</groupId> <artifactId>smartrecharge-system</artifactId> <version>1.0.0</version> <relativePath>../pom.xml</relativePath> </parent>
<artifactId>config-server</artifactId> <name>config-server</name>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-config-server</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-netflix-eureka-client</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-actuator</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <optional>true</optional> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
server: port: 8060
spring: application: name: config-server profiles: active: native cloud: config: server: native: search-locations: file:./config-repo,file:../config-repo
eureka: client: service-url: defaultZone: http://localhost:8061/eureka
management: endpoints: web: exposure: include: health,info

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
server: port: 8060
spring: application: name: config-server cloud: config: server: git: uri: https://github.com/SHA-shwatdubey/smartrecharge-config.git default-label: main searchPaths: / timeout: 5 cloneOnStart: true skipSslValidation: false username: ${GIT_USERNAME:} password: ${GIT_PASSWORD:}
eureka: client: enabled: false register-with-eureka: false fetch-registry: false
management: endpoints: web: exposure: include: health,info

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <module org.jetbrains.idea.maven.project.MavenProjectsManager.isMavenModule="true" type="JAVA_MODULE" version="4"> <component name="NewModuleRootManager" LANGUAGE_LEVEL="MODULE_17"> <output url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/target/classes" /> <output-test url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/target/test-classes" /> <content url="file://$MODULE_DIR$"> <sourceFolder url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/src/main/java" isTestSource="false" /> <sourceFolder url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/src/main/resources" type="java-resource" /> <sourceFolder url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/src/test/java" isTestSource="true" /> <excludeFolder url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/target" /> </content> <orderEntry type="inheritedJdk" /> <orderEntry type="sourceFolder" /> </component> </module>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<parent> <groupId>com.smartrecharge</groupId> <artifactId>smartrecharge-system</artifactId> <version>1.0.0</version> <relativePath>../pom.xml</relativePath> </parent>
<artifactId>customer-service</artifactId> <name>customer-service</name>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-netflix-eureka-client</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-config</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-actuator</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.postgresql</groupId> <artifactId>postgresql</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springdoc</groupId> <artifactId>springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui</artifactId> <version>2.6.0</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.webjars</groupId> <artifactId>webjars-locator-core</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <optional>true</optional> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.value:
spring: application: name: customer-service config: import: optional:configserver:http://localhost:8060
server: port: 8063
springdoc: swagger-ui: path: /swagger-ui.html enabled: true try-it-out-enabled: true api-docs: path: /v3/api-docs enabled: true

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <module org.jetbrains.idea.maven.project.MavenProjectsManager.isMavenModule="true" type="JAVA_MODULE" version="4"> <component name="NewModuleRootManager" LANGUAGE_LEVEL="MODULE_17"> <output url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/target/classes" /> <output-test url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/target/test-classes" /> <content url="file://$MODULE_DIR$"> <sourceFolder url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/src/main/java" isTestSource="false" /> <sourceFolder url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/src/main/resources" type="java-resource" /> <sourceFolder url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/src/test/java" isTestSource="true" /> <excludeFolder url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/target" /> </content> <orderEntry type="inheritedJdk" /> <orderEntry type="sourceFolder" /> </component> </module>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<parent> <groupId>com.smartrecharge</groupId> <artifactId>smartrecharge-system</artifactId> <version>1.0.0</version> <relativePath>../pom.xml</relativePath> </parent>
<artifactId>eureka-server</artifactId> <name>eureka-server</name>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-netflix-eureka-server</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-actuator</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <optional>true</optional> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
spring: application: name: eureka-server
config: import: optional:configserver:http://localhost:8060
server: port: 8061
eureka: client: register-with-eureka: false fetch-registry: false

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<parent> <groupId>com.smartrecharge</groupId> <artifactId>smartrecharge-system</artifactId> <version>1.0.0</version> <relativePath>../pom.xml</relativePath> </parent>
<artifactId>processing-service</artifactId> <name>processing-service</name>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-amqp</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-netflix-eureka-client</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-config</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.postgresql</groupId> <artifactId>postgresql</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springdoc</groupId> <artifactId>springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui</artifactId> <version>2.7.0</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-actuator</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <optional>true</optional> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<parent> <groupId>com.smartrecharge</groupId> <artifactId>smartrecharge-system</artifactId> <version>1.0.0</version> <relativePath>../pom.xml</relativePath> </parent>
<artifactId>processing-service</artifactId> <name>processing-service</name>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-amqp</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-netflix-eureka-client</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-config</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.postgresql</groupId> <artifactId>postgresql</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springdoc</groupId> <artifactId>springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui</artifactId> <version>2.6.0</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.webjars</groupId> <artifactId>webjars-locator-core</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-actuator</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <optional>true</optional> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <module org.jetbrains.idea.maven.project.MavenProjectsManager.isMavenModule="true" type="JAVA_MODULE" version="4"> <component name="NewModuleRootManager" LANGUAGE_LEVEL="MODULE_17"> <output url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/target/classes" /> <output-test url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/target/test-classes" /> <content url="file://$MODULE_DIR$"> <sourceFolder url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/src/main/java" isTestSource="false" /> <sourceFolder url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/src/main/resources" type="java-resource" /> <sourceFolder url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/src/test/java" isTestSource="true" /> <excludeFolder url="file://$MODULE_DIR$/target" /> </content> <orderEntry type="inheritedJdk" /> <orderEntry type="sourceFolder" /> </component> </module>

option.value:
spring: application: name: processing-service config: import: optional:configserver:http://localhost:8060
server: port: 8065
rabbitmq: exchange: recharge.exchange queue: recharge.queue routing-key: recharge.routing.key
springdoc: swagger-ui: path: /swagger-ui.html enabled: true try-it-out-enabled: true api-docs: path: /v3/api-docs enabled: true

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<parent> <groupId>com.smartrecharge</groupId> <artifactId>smartrecharge-system</artifactId> <version>1.0.0</version> <relativePath>../pom.xml</relativePath> </parent>
<artifactId>recharge-service</artifactId> <name>recharge-service</name>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-amqp</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-netflix-eureka-client</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-config</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-openfeign</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.postgresql</groupId> <artifactId>postgresql</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springdoc</groupId> <artifactId>springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui</artifactId> <version>2.6.0</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.webjars</groupId> <artifactId>webjars-locator-core</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-actuator</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <optional>true</optional> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.value:
spring: application: name: recharge-service config: import: optional:configserver:http://localhost:8060
server: port: 8064
rabbitmq: exchange: recharge.exchange queue: recharge.queue routing-key: recharge.routing.key
springdoc: swagger-ui: path: /swagger-ui.html enabled: true try-it-out-enabled: true api-docs: path: /v3/api-docs enabled: true
